content: I'm trying to optimize my morning routine. I'm always rushing to get to Nexus Labs by 9 AM. Any tips?
What's your current morning like? I can suggest some time-saving ideas if I know your schedule.
I usually wake up at 7:30, have coffee and toast, then check emails for 15 minutes before heading out. I live in a shared apartment downtown, so I have to deal with morning traffic.
What if you prepped breakfast the night before and did email checking on your commute? That could give you an extra 20 minutes.
I could try overnight oats. I've been meaning to get into baking sourdough anyway, so maybe I can make that on weekends and have it ready for the week.
